channel.title: Posts on KAI's academic page
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on KAI's academic page

item.title: Selected Publications
item.description: Preprints and Submitted Fused robust geometric nonparallel hyperplane support vector machine for pattern classificationRuiyao Gao, Qi Kai, Yang Hu*. Accepted and published Capped asymmetric elastic net support vector machine for robust binary classificationQi Kai, Yang Hu*. [PaperLink] International Journal of Intelligent Systems, 2023, 2023(1): 2201330 . LS-GNHSVM: a novel unified nonparallel hyperplane classifier with geometrical rationalityQi Kai, Yang Hu*. [PaperLink] Expert Systems with Applications, 2023, 215: 119413.

item.title: Talks
item.description: Joint rescaled asymmetric least squared nonparallel support vector machine with a stochastic quasi-Newton based algorithm (Student best paper)The 8th annual conference of CQSIAM (2022)，oral reportChongqing · China Joint sparse principal component regression with robust property (Student best paper)The 7th annual conference of CQSIAM (2021)，oral reportChongqing · China Elastic net nonparallel hyperplane support vector machine and its geometrical rationalityThe 18th annual conference of CSIAM (2020)，oral reportHunan · China

item.title: Teaching and Services
item.description: Teaching Previously, I was a teaching assistant in Chongqing Unversity for: Linear Algebra, 2019-2023 Calculus II, 2020 Spring Mathematics Modeling, 2019 Fall Probability theory and mathematical statistics, 2017 Fall Professional services I have served as an anonymous reviewer for the following journals: IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics Pattern Recognition Applied Intelligence The Journal of Supercomputing Human-centric Computing and Information Sciences Journal of Computational Methods in Sciences and Engineering
